title: Flamingo - Software update for just headset
scenario: Verify that a software update can be performed for just the headset (without the charge case) when both updates are available.
steps: Tap Update button on device home screen -> Device settings opens with Software Update tab expanded, showing 'Update All' button and separate update buttons for headset and charge case.
Tap 'Update' next to the headset and complete DFU -> DFU process completes for headset only, and only the headset is on the latest firmware.
expected: DFU process completes for headset only, and only the headset is on the latest firmware.
